title: agalinis viridis
intro: Agalinis viridis, also known as green agalinis, is a plant species in the figwort family that is native to North America. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant has been used to support digestive health, alleviate respiratory problems, and even help manage anxiety and stress. Agalinis viridis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
